name: Amaretto Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the apples and core them.
2. Cut into 1/4-inch dice and set aside.
3. Melt the butter in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the apple pieces to the skillet and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Saute until the apples are tender, about 6 minutes.
6. Stir in the raisins.
7. Add the liqueur and cook until the liquid reduces to a glaze, about 1 minute.
8. Divide between 2 dessert dishes.
9. Garnish with almonds and whipped cream.
10. Serve immediately.
